# Ohio Valley Land Partners
> Cash land buyers serving the Ohio Valley plus an active Franklin County, Ohio campaign.
> Ohio Valley Land Partners reviews direct land acquisition inquiries as a prospective principal buyer.
> Close in 14–21 days. No agent fees. No commissions. Any condition.

## Core Pages
- /: Homepage — services overview, counties served, process summary
- /about: Company background, community giving commitment (5% per closing to Arc of Appalachia and Salvation Army East Palestine)
- /contact: Submit a property for internal acquisition review
- /land: Land offers silo — direct principal buyer services
- /community: Community giving — 5% of every closing donated
- /land-scouts: Introductions and local partnerships; no compensation is promised

- /sell-land/marshall-county-wv: County acquisition interests and general property information
- /sell-land/brooke-county-wv: County acquisition interests and general property information

- /ohio-valley-guides/marshall-county-wv: Marshall County WV land market guide
- /ohio-valley-guides/brooke-county-wv: Brooke County WV land market guide

## Blog — Educational Content for Land Sellers
- /blog/sell-inherited-land-ohio-probate: General inherited-land questions to discuss with licensed professionals
- /blog/cash-land-buyers-ohio-valley: General information about direct principal buyers
- /blog/ohio-valley-land-market-2026: Ohio Valley land market conditions and outlook for 2026
- /blog/sell-vacant-land-delaware-county-ohio: Selling vacant land in Delaware County, Ohio
- /blog/sell-land-back-taxes-ohio: Questions to discuss with licensed professionals when taxes are delinquent
- /blog/land-near-intel-new-albany-ohio: Selling land near Intel New Albany semiconductor campus
- /blog/sell-land-belmont-county-ohio-fast: Belmont County acquisition notes
- /blog/sell-land-jefferson-county-ohio-steubenville: Selling land in Jefferson County (Steubenville area)
- /blog/sell-land-columbiana-county-ohio: Selling land in Columbiana County, Ohio
- /blog/sell-land-ohio-county-west-virginia-wheeling: Selling land in Ohio County, West Virginia (Wheeling)
- /blog/sell-land-marshall-county-wv-moundsville: Selling land in Marshall County, WV (Moundsville)
- /blog/what-to-do-with-land-you-dont-want: What to do with land you inherited or don't want
- /blog/brooke-harrison-carroll-county-land-buyers: Cash land buyers in Brooke, Harrison, and Carroll counties
- /blog/franklin-county-ohio-sell-vacant-land-2026: Franklin County campaign notes
- /blog/brooke-county-wv-land-worth-2026: Property factors buyers may consider in Brooke County
- /blog/sell-vacant-land-geauga-county-ohio-2026: Selling vacant land in Geauga County, Ohio — Chesterland, Chardon, western townships (active campaign)

## Service Area
Ohio counties: Belmont, Jefferson, Columbiana, Harrison, Carroll
West Virginia counties: Ohio County, Marshall, Brooke
Active campaign markets: Franklin County, Ohio · Geauga County, Ohio (western townships)

## Key Facts
- Principal buyer — not a licensed real estate broker
- Property-specific purchase proposals may be presented after review; no purchase, price, or timing is guaranteed
- Closing terms and timing depend on the written agreement, title review, and property-specific conditions
- Considers a range of parcel conditions while directing legal, tax, title, and valuation questions to licensed professionals
- 5% of every closing donated to Arc of Appalachia and Salvation Army East Palestine Recovery
- Headquarters: 2025 Riverside Drive STE 35682, Columbus, OH 43221
- Phone: (614) 653-7430
- Email: info@ohiovalleylandpartners.com
- Founder: Richard B. Jamison
